heading: (intro)
raw: Directed by Christopher Nolan. Written by Christopher Nolan and Jonathan Nolan.
clean: Directed by Christopher Nolan. Written by Christopher Nolan and Jonathan Nolan.

heading: Harvey Dent/Two-Face
raw: The night is darkest just before the dawn. And I promise you, the dawn is coming.
clean: The night is darkest just before the dawn. And I promise you, the dawn is coming.

heading: Harvey Dent/Two-Face
raw: You either die a hero, or you live long enough to see yourself become the villain.
clean: You either die a hero, or you live long enough to see yourself become the villain.

heading: Harvey Dent/Two-Face
raw: You think I wanna escape from this? There is no escape from this!
clean: You think I wanna escape from this? There is no escape from this!

heading: Harvey Dent/Two-Face
raw: Have you ever had to talk to the person you love most, tell them it's all going to be alright when you know it's not? Well... you're about to know what that feels like, Gordon. Then, you can look me in the eye and tell me you're sorry.
clean: Have you ever had to talk to the person you love most, tell them it's all going to be alright when you know it's not? Well... you're about to know what that feels like, Gordon. Then, you can look me in the eye and tell me you're sorry.

heading: Harvey Dent/Two-Face
raw: Tell your boy it’s going to be alright, Gordon. Lie, like I lied.
clean: Tell your boy it's going to be alright, Gordon. Lie, like I lied.

heading: The Joker
raw: [to bank manager] I believe whatever doesn't kill you simply makes you...stranger.
clean: I believe whatever doesn't kill you simply makes you...stranger.

heading: The Joker
raw: [to Dent] Do I really look like a guy with a plan? You know what I am? I'm a dog chasing cars. I wouldn't know what to do with one if I caught it! You know, I just... do things.
clean: Do I really look like a guy with a plan? You know what I am? I'm a dog chasing cars. I wouldn't know what to do with one if I caught it! You know, I just... do things.

heading: Others
raw: Commissioner James Gordon: Goddammit, will you stop pointing that gun at my family?!
clean: Goddammit, will you stop pointing that gun at my family?!

heading: Dialogue
raw: Sal Maroni: How soon can you move the money?
clean: How soon can you move the money?

heading: Dialogue
raw: Lau: I already have. For obvious reasons, I couldn't wait for your permission. Rest assured, your money is safe.
clean: I already have. For obvious reasons, I couldn't wait for your permission. Rest assured, your money is safe.

heading: Dialogue
raw: The Joker: [enters laughing sarcastically] And I thought my jokes were bad!
clean: And I thought my jokes were bad!

heading: Dialogue
raw: Gambol: Give me one reason why I shouldn't have my boy here pull your head off.
clean: Give me one reason why I shouldn't have my boy here pull your head off.

heading: Dialogue
raw: The Joker: How about a magic trick? [sticks a pencil into the table, point first] I'm gonna make this pencil disappear. [slams Gambol's henchman's head down upon the pencil, penetrating his eye socket] Ta-da! It's— it's gone! Oh, and by the way, the suit, it wasn't cheap. You ought to know. You bought it! [Gambol rises in anger]
clean: How about a magic trick? I'm gonna make this pencil disappear. Ta-da! It's- it's gone! Oh, and by the way, the suit, it wasn't cheap. You ought to know. You bought it!

heading: Dialogue
raw: The Chechen: Sit. I want to hear proposition. [Gambol sits down]
clean: Sit. I want to hear proposition.

heading: Dialogue
raw: The Joker: Let's wind the clocks back a year. These cops and lawyers wouldn't dare cross any of you. I mean, what happened? Did your – did your balls drop off? Hmm? You see, a guy like me—
clean: Let's wind the clocks back a year. These cops and lawyers wouldn't dare cross any of you. I mean, what happened? Did your - did your balls drop off? Hmm? You see, a guy like me-

heading: Dialogue
raw: Gambol: A freak! [mobsters chuckle]
clean: A freak!

heading: Dialogue
raw: The Chechen: What do you propose?
clean: What do you propose?

heading: Dialogue
raw: The Joker: It's simple. We, uh, kill the Batman. [the mobsters laugh]
clean: It's simple. We, uh, kill the Batman.

heading: Dialogue
raw: Sal Maroni: If it's so simple, why haven't you done it already?
clean: If it's so simple, why haven't you done it already?

heading: Dialogue
raw: The Joker: If you're good at something, never do it for free.
clean: If you're good at something, never do it for free.

heading: Dialogue
raw: The Chechen: How much you want?
clean: How much you want?

heading: Dialogue
raw: The Joker: Uh, half. [the mobsters laugh again]
clean: Uh, half.

heading: Dialogue
raw: Gambol: You're crazy.
clean: You're crazy.

heading: Dialogue
raw: The Joker: I'm not. No, I'm not! If we don't deal with this now, soon little, uh, Gambol here won't be able to get a nickel for his grandma.
clean: I'm not. No, I'm not! If we don't deal with this now, soon little, uh, Gambol here won't be able to get a nickel for his grandma.

heading: Dialogue
raw: Gambol: [slams the table] Enough from the clown!
clean: Enough from the clown!

heading: Dialogue
raw: The Joker: [revealing hand grenades under his jacket] Ah-ta-ta-ta. Let's not blow this out of proportion.
clean: Ah-ta-ta-ta. Let's not blow this out of proportion.

heading: Dialogue
raw: Gambol: You think you can steal from us and just walk away?
clean: You think you can steal from us and just walk away?

heading: Dialogue
raw: The Joker: Yeah.
clean: Yeah.

heading: Dialogue
raw: Gambol: I'm putting the word out. Five hundred grand for this clown dead. A million alive, so I can teach him some manners first.
clean: I'm putting the word out. Five hundred grand for this clown dead. A million alive, so I can teach him some manners first.

heading: Dialogue
raw: The Joker: All right, so listen. Why don't you give me a call when you want to start taking things a little more seriously? Here's my card. [leaves Joker card on the table, backs out of the room]
clean: All right, so listen. Why don't you give me a call when you want to start taking things a little more seriously? Here's my card.

heading: Dialogue
raw: Jim Gordon: I hear you've got a hell of a right cross. It’s a shame Sal's going to walk.
clean: I hear you've got a hell of a right cross. It's a shame Sal's going to walk.

heading: Dialogue
raw: Harvey Dent: Well, good thing about the mob is they keep giving you second chances. [Looking through a bundle of bills] Lightly irradiated bills. Fancy stuff for a city cop. Have help?
clean: Well, good thing about the mob is they keep giving you second chances. Lightly irradiated bills. Fancy stuff for a city cop. Have help?

heading: Dialogue
raw: Gordon: We liaise with various agencies-
clean: We liaise with various agencies-

heading: Dialogue
raw: Dent: Save it, Gordon. I want to meet him.
clean: Save it, Gordon. I want to meet him.

heading: Dialogue
raw: Gordon: Official policy is to arrest the vigilante know as “Batman” on sight.
clean: Official policy is to arrest the vigilante know as "Batman" on sight.

heading: Dialogue
raw: Dent: And that flood light on top of M.C.U.?
clean: And that flood light on top of M.C.U.?

heading: Dialogue
raw: Gordon: If you have problems with malfunctioning equipment, I suggest you take them up with maintenance, counselor.
clean: If you have problems with malfunctioning equipment, I suggest you take them up with maintenance, counselor.

heading: Dialogue
raw: Dent: I've put every known money launderer in Gotham behind bars but the mob is still getting its money out. I think you and your "friend" have found the last game in town and you're trying to hit them where it hurts: their wallets. It's bold. You gonna count me in?
clean: I've put every known money launderer in Gotham behind bars but the mob is still getting its money out. I think you and your "friend" have found the last game in town and you're trying to hit them where it hurts: their wallets. It's bold. You gonna count me in?

heading: Dialogue
raw: Gordon: In this town, the fewer people know something, the safer the operation.
clean: In this town, the fewer people know something, the safer the operation.

heading: Dialogue
raw: Dent: Gordon, I don't like that you've got your own special unit, and I don't like that it's full of cops I investigated while I was at at internal affairs.
clean: Gordon, I don't like that you've got your own special unit, and I don't like that it's full of cops I investigated while I was at at internal affairs.

heading: Dialogue
raw: Gordon: If I didn't work with cops you'd investigated while you were making your name at I.A.- I'd be working alone. I don't get political points for being an idealist. I have to do the best I can with what I have.
clean: If I didn't work with cops you'd investigated while you were making your name at I.A.- I'd be working alone. I don't get political points for being an idealist. I have to do the best I can with what I have.

heading: Dialogue
raw: Dent: You want me to back warrants for search and seizure on five banks without telling me what we're after?
clean: You want me to back warrants for search and seizure on five banks without telling me what we're after?

heading: Dialogue
raw: Gordon: I can give you the names of the banks.
clean: I can give you the names of the banks.

heading: Dialogue
raw: Dent: Well, that's a start. I'll get you your warrants. But I want your trust.
clean: Well, that's a start. I'll get you your warrants. But I want your trust.

heading: Dialogue
raw: Gordon: You don’t have to sell me, Dent. We all know you’re Gotham’s white knight.
clean: You don't have to sell me, Dent. We all know you're Gotham's white knight.

heading: Dialogue
raw: Dent: I hear they have a different name for me down at M.C.U.
clean: I hear they have a different name for me down at M.C.U.

heading: Dialogue
raw: Gordon: [softly, with his head down] I wouldn’t know about that..
clean: I wouldn't know about that..

heading: Dialogue
raw: Bruce Wayne: You look tired, Alfred. You'll be all right without me?
clean: You look tired, Alfred. You'll be all right without me?

heading: Dialogue
raw: Alfred Pennyworth: [glancing at a yacht full of beautiful Russian women] If you can tell me the Russian for "Apply your own bloody suntan lotion."
clean: If you can tell me the Russian for "Apply your own bloody suntan lotion."

heading: Dialogue
raw: Guest: We're not intimidated by thugs!
clean: We're not intimidated by thugs!

heading: Dialogue
raw: The Joker: You know, you remind me of my father. [grabs him at knifepoint] I hated my father!
clean: You know, you remind me of my father. I hated my father!

heading: Dialogue
raw: Rachel Dawes: Okay, stop!
clean: Okay, stop!

heading: Dialogue
raw: Batman: [appearing out of nowhere] Then you're gonna love me.
clean: Then you're gonna love me.

heading: Dialogue
raw: Bruce Wayne: Targeting me won't get their money back. I knew the mob wouldn't go down without a fight, but this is different. They've crossed a line.
clean: Targeting me won't get their money back. I knew the mob wouldn't go down without a fight, but this is different. They've crossed a line.

heading: Dialogue
raw: Alfred Pennyworth: You crossed the line first, sir. You squeezed them, you hammered them to the point of desperation, and in their desperation, they turned to a man they didn't fully understand.
clean: You crossed the line first, sir. You squeezed them, you hammered them to the point of desperation, and in their desperation, they turned to a man they didn't fully understand.

heading: Dialogue
raw: Bruce: Criminals aren't complicated, Alfred. We just need to figure out what he's after.
clean: Criminals aren't complicated, Alfred. We just need to figure out what he's after.

heading: Dialogue
raw: Bruce: So why steal them?
clean: So why steal them?

heading: Dialogue
raw: Alfred: Well, because he thought it was good sport. Because some men aren't looking for anything logical, like money. They can't be bought, bullied, reasoned or negotiated with. Some men just want to watch the world burn.
clean: Well, because he thought it was good sport. Because some men aren't looking for anything logical, like money. They can't be bought, bullied, reasoned or negotiated with. Some men just want to watch the world burn.

heading: Dialogue
raw: Lucius Fox: What can I do for you, Mr. Reese?
clean: What can I do for you, Mr. Reese?

heading: Dialogue
raw: Coleman Reese: You wanted me to do the diligence on the LSA Holdings deal, again. Well, I found some irregularities.
clean: You wanted me to do the diligence on the LSA Holdings deal, again. Well, I found some irregularities.

heading: Dialogue
raw: Fox: Yes, their CEO is in police custody.
clean: Yes, their CEO is in police custody.

heading: Dialogue
raw: Fox: Let me get this straight: You think that your client - one of the wealthiest, most powerful men in the world - is secretly a vigilante who spends his nights beating criminals to a pulp with his bare hands, and your plan is to blackmail this person?
clean: Let me get this straight: You think that your client - one of the wealthiest, most powerful men in the world - is secretly a vigilante who spends his nights beating criminals to a pulp with his bare hands, and your plan is to blackmail this person?

heading: Dialogue
raw: Fox: Good luck.
clean: Good luck.

heading: Dialogue
raw: Bruce Wayne: People are dying, Alfred. What would you have me do?
clean: People are dying, Alfred. What would you have me do?

heading: Dialogue
raw: Alfred Pennyworth: Endure, Master Wayne. Take it. They'll hate you for it, but that's the point of Batman. He can be the outcast. He can make the choice that no one else can make - the right choice.
clean: Endure, Master Wayne. Take it. They'll hate you for it, but that's the point of Batman. He can be the outcast. He can make the choice that no one else can make - the right choice.

heading: Dialogue
raw: Bruce: Well, today I found out what Batman can't do. He can't endure this. Today you get to say "I told you so".
clean: Well, today I found out what Batman can't do. He can't endure this. Today you get to say "I told you so".

heading: Dialogue
raw: Alfred: Today, I don't want to. [pause] But I did bloody tell you. I suppose they'll lock me up as well, as your accomplice.
clean: Today, I don't want to. But I did bloody tell you. I suppose they'll lock me up as well, as your accomplice.

heading: Dialogue
raw: Bruce: Accomplice? I'm gonna tell them the whole thing was your idea!
clean: Accomplice? I'm gonna tell them the whole thing was your idea!

heading: Dialogue
raw: Batman: I want the Joker.
clean: I want the Joker.

heading: Dialogue
raw: Sal Maroni: From one professional to another: If you're trying to scare somebody, pick a better spot. From this height, the fall wouldn't kill me.
clean: From one professional to another: If you're trying to scare somebody, pick a better spot. From this height, the fall wouldn't kill me.

raw: Batman: I'm counting on it. [drops Maroni, breaking his leg, then vaults down to him] WHERE IS HE?!

heading: Dialogue
raw: Maroni: I don't know where he is. He found us.
clean: I don't know where he is. He found us.

heading: Dialogue

heading: Dialogue
raw: Maroni: Friends? You met this guy?

heading: Dialogue
raw: Batman: Someone knows where he is!

heading: Dialogue

heading: Dialogue
raw: Harvey Dent: Not exactly.

heading: Dialogue
raw: Batman: His name's Schiff, Thomas. He's a paranoid schizophrenic. Former patient at Arkham - the kind of mind the Joker attracts. What do you expect to learn from him?

heading: Dialogue

heading: Dialogue

raw: Batman: I'm considering it.

heading: Dialogue

clean: Liberty, come in. It's dead.

heading: Dialogue
raw: The Joker: Anyone attempts to get off their boat, you all die.
clean: Anyone attempts to get off their boat, you all die.

heading: Dialogue
raw: Lucius Fox: [operating sonar network at Wayne Enterprises] I'm zeroing in.
clean: I'm zeroing in.

heading: Dialogue
raw: The Joker: Each of you has the remote to blow up the other boat.
clean: Each of you has the remote to blow up the other boat.

heading: Dialogue
raw: Lucius Fox: The voice is on the ferry...but it's not the source. West.
clean: The voice is on the ferry...but it's not the source. West.

heading: Dialogue
raw: Commissioner Gordon: [answers his cell phone] Gordon.
clean: Gordon.

heading: Dialogue
raw: Batman: I have the Joker's location. Prewitt Building. Assemble on the building opposite.
clean: I have the Joker's location. Prewitt Building. Assemble on the building opposite.

heading: Dialogue
raw: The Joker: We really should stop this fighting. Otherwise we'll miss the fireworks.
clean: We really should stop this fighting. Otherwise we'll miss the fireworks.

heading: Dialogue
raw: Batman: There won't be any fireworks!
clean: There won't be any fireworks!

heading: Dialogue
raw: The Joker: And here...we...go. [shocked by silence as the clock passes midnight without either ferry destroyed]
clean: And here...we...go.

heading: Dialogue
raw: Batman: What were you trying to prove? That deep down, everyone's as ugly as you? You're alone!
clean: What were you trying to prove? That deep down, everyone's as ugly as you? You're alone!

heading: Dialogue
raw: The Joker: Can't rely on anyone these days. You gotta do everything yourself. Don't we? [pulls out another detonator] That's okay. I came prepared. It's a funny world we live in. Speaking of which, you know how I got these scars?
clean: Can't rely on anyone these days. You gotta do everything yourself. Don't we? That's okay. I came prepared. It's a funny world we live in. Speaking of which, you know how I got these scars?

heading: Dialogue
raw: Batman: No... but I know how you got these! [fires gauntlet blades into the Joker's face and throws him off the building, then hoists him back up]
clean: No... but I know how you got these!

heading: Dialogue
raw: Batman: You'll be in a padded cell forever!
clean: You'll be in a padded cell forever!

heading: Dialogue
raw: The Joker: Maybe we could share one. You know, they'll be doubling up at the rate this city's inhabitants are losing their minds.
clean: Maybe we could share one. You know, they'll be doubling up at the rate this city's inhabitants are losing their minds.

heading: Dialogue
raw: Batman: This city just showed you that it's full of people ready to believe in good.
clean: This city just showed you that it's full of people ready to believe in good.

heading: Dialogue
raw: The Joker: Until their spirit breaks completely. Until they get a good look at the real Harvey Dent, huh? And all the heroic things he's done. You didn't think I'd risk losing the battle for Gotham's soul in a fistfight with you? No. You need an ace in the hole. Mine's Harvey.
clean: Until their spirit breaks completely. Until they get a good look at the real Harvey Dent, huh? And all the heroic things he's done. You didn't think I'd risk losing the battle for Gotham's soul in a fistfight with you? No. You need an ace in the hole. Mine's Harvey.

heading: Dialogue
raw: Batman: What did you do?
clean: What did you do?

heading: Dialogue
raw: The Joker: I took Gotham's "White Knight" and I brought him down to our level. It wasn't hard. See, madness, as you know, is like gravity. All it takes is a little push.
clean: I took Gotham's "White Knight" and I brought him down to our level. It wasn't hard. See, madness, as you know, is like gravity. All it takes is a little push.

heading: Dialogue
raw: Batman: You don't want to hurt the boy, Harvey.
clean: You don't want to hurt the boy, Harvey.

heading: Dialogue
raw: Two-Face: It's not about what I want, it's about what's FAIR! You thought we could be decent men in an indecent time, but you were wrong. The world is cruel, and the only morality in a cruel world is chance — unbiased, unprejudiced, fair. His son has the same chance she had. [shows both sides of his coin] Fifty-fifty.
clean: It's not about what I want, it's about what's FAIR! You thought we could be decent men in an indecent time, but you were wrong. The world is cruel, and the only morality in a cruel world is chance - unbiased, unprejudiced, fair. His son has the same chance she had. Fifty-fifty.

heading: Dialogue
raw: Batman: What happened to Rachel wasn't chance. We decided to act — we three.
clean: What happened to Rachel wasn't chance. We decided to act - we three.

heading: Dialogue
raw: Two-Face: Then why was it me who was only one who lost everything?!
clean: Then why was it me who was only one who lost everything?!

heading: Dialogue
raw: Batman: ...It wasn't.
clean: ...It wasn't.

heading: Dialogue
raw: Two-Face: The Joker chose me!
clean: The Joker chose me!

heading: Dialogue
raw: Batman: Because you were the best of us! He wanted to prove that even someone as good as you could fall!
clean: Because you were the best of us! He wanted to prove that even someone as good as you could fall!

heading: Dialogue
raw: Two-Face: And he was right.
clean: And he was right.

heading: Dialogue
raw: Batman: You're the one pointing the gun, Harvey. So point it at the people responsible.
clean: You're the one pointing the gun, Harvey. So point it at the people responsible.

heading: Dialogue
raw: James Gordon: The Joker won. All of Harvey's prosecutions, everything he fought for: undone. Whatever chance you gave us of fixing our city dies with Harvey's reputation. We bet it all on him. The Joker took the best of us and tore him down. People will lose hope.
clean: The Joker won. All of Harvey's prosecutions, everything he fought for: undone. Whatever chance you gave us of fixing our city dies with Harvey's reputation. We bet it all on him. The Joker took the best of us and tore him down. People will lose hope.

heading: Dialogue
raw: Batman: They won't. They must never know what he did.
clean: They won't. They must never know what he did.

heading: Dialogue
raw: Gordon: Five dead, two of them cops? You can't sweep that up.
clean: Five dead, two of them cops? You can't sweep that up.

heading: Dialogue
raw: Batman: But the Joker cannot win. Gotham needs its true hero.
clean: But the Joker cannot win. Gotham needs its true hero.

heading: Dialogue
raw: Batman: "You either die a hero, or you live long enough to see yourself become the villain." I can do those things, because I'm not a hero, not like Dent. I killed those people. That's what I can be.
clean: "You either die a hero, or you live long enough to see yourself become the villain." I can do those things, because I'm not a hero, not like Dent. I killed those people. That's what I can be.

heading: Dialogue
raw: Gordon: No. No, you can't. You're not!
clean: No. No, you can't. You're not!

heading: Dialogue
raw: Batman: I'm whatever Gotham needs me to be. Call it in.
clean: I'm whatever Gotham needs me to be. Call it in.

heading: Dialogue
raw: Gordon: [speaking at Dent's funeral] ...A hero. Not the hero we deserved, but the hero we needed. Nothing less than a knight, shining...
clean: ...A hero. Not the hero we deserved, but the hero we needed. Nothing less than a knight, shining...

heading: Dialogue
raw: Gordon: [to Batman] We'll hunt you.
clean: We'll hunt you.

heading: Dialogue
raw: Batman: You'll hunt me. You'll condemn me, set the dogs on me, because that's what needs to happen, because sometimes truth isn't good enough. Sometimes people deserve more. Sometimes people deserve to have their faith rewarded. [runs]
clean: You'll hunt me. You'll condemn me, set the dogs on me, because that's what needs to happen, because sometimes truth isn't good enough. Sometimes people deserve more. Sometimes people deserve to have their faith rewarded.

heading: Dialogue
raw: Gordon's Son: Batman? Batman! Why is he running, Dad?
clean: Batman? Batman! Why is he running, Dad?

heading: Dialogue
raw: Gordon: Because we have to chase him.
clean: Because we have to chase him.

heading: Dialogue
raw: Police sergeant: Okay, we're going in. Go! Go! Move!
clean: Okay, we're going in. Go! Go! Move!

heading: Dialogue
raw: Gordon's Son: He didn't do anything wrong.
clean: He didn't do anything wrong.

heading: Dialogue
raw: Gordon: Because he's the hero Gotham deserves, but not the one it needs right now. So we'll hunt him, because he can take it, because he's not our hero. He's a silent guardian — a watchful protector — a dark knight.
clean: Because he's the hero Gotham deserves, but not the one it needs right now. So we'll hunt him, because he can take it, because he's not our hero. He's a silent guardian - a watchful protector - a dark knight.
